content: Every ship page must carry unique authentic images — no cross-ship or cross-entity reuse of the same bytes or near-crops. The standing operator test is 'does every ship have unique images on it?'. An honest placeholder (single /assets/ship-map.png slide + 'authentic photography pending sourcing' prose) is acceptable; dishonest reuse is not. Scanner findings (#1502/#1503 warnings) are expected to be resolved, not normalized to.
